prompt: A dramatic photorealistic fast-food hero shot of a giant crispy fried chicken sandwich and a side basket of loaded fries on a dark restaurant table. The sandwich is centered slightly left and stacked tall with a glossy brioche bun, spicy orange sauce on the top bun, 2 purple-red onion rings, 3 pickle slices, 2 tomato slices, melted cheddar cheese dripping over an extra-crunchy fried chicken fillet, curly green leaf lettuce, and more creamy orange sauce dripping from the bottom bun. To the right, show a black wire basket filled with thick-cut fries topped with crunchy fried chicken bites, white drizzle sauce, and small green herb garnish. Freeze motion with multiple splashes and droplets of orange sauce exploding upward and around the burger, plus floating crumbs and seasoning particles in the air. Use warm cinematic lighting, deep shadows, high contrast, shallow depth of field, rich golden-brown textures, glossy highlights on the bun and sauce, and a moody blurred bokeh background in an upscale casual restaurant setting. Camera angle is low and close, 3/4 front view, sharp focus on the burger, fries slightly secondary but still detailed. Dark slate serving plate, scattered crumbs and sauce drips on the surface. Add a clean white Pollo.ai logo in the top-right corner.
